title: SystemVerilog unsized literal '1 incorrectly evaluated as 1-bit value instead of filling all bits

features.name: unsized_literal_fill_all_bits
features.description: Code should include an unsized literal ('0, '1, 'X, 'x, 'Z, 'z) used in an assignment where the width is determined by the assignment target, not self-determined

features.name: unsized_literal_assertion_check
features.description: Code should include an assertion verifying that all bits of a multi-bit signal are set to 1 after assigning an unsized '1 literal
